name: CMUV Bancorp
summary: CMUV Bancorp operates as the holding company for Community Valley Bank that provides banking products and services to small and middle-market businesses, and individuals in California. The company's personal banking products include checking and savings accounts, and IRA's and certificates of deposit; and lending and investment products. Its business banking products comprise business checking, money market, and savings accounts; certificates of deposit; and business loans, such as business lines of credit, business equipment and tenant improvement loans, commercial real estate loans, and SBA 504 and 7(a) loans. The company also provides online banking services. It operates through five full-service offices in El Centro, Brawley, Borrego Springs, Palm Desert, and Julian. CMUV Bancorp was founded in 2007 and is based in El Centro, California.
